overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a flying vehicle navigating through a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape in Cyberpunk 2077. The vehicle weaves between glass skyscrapers, passes a massive circular stadium structure, and transitions to an industrial desert landscape with highway interchanges.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban canyon between glass skyscrapers

events.description: vehicle accelerates while approaching the circular stadium structure ahead

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle through a narrow corridor between futuristic glass skyscrapers, maintaining steady altitude

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass and steel building with reflective surfaces passing by on the left
cluster of high-rise buildings visible on the right side of the flight path
massive circular stadium structure with metallic framework visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person cockpit view flying through a dense futuristic city canyon. Glass skyscrapers flank both sides while the vehicle approaches a massive circular stadium structure in the distance. The lighting is bright midday sun with clear visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching and passing the circular stadium structure

events.description: passing alongside the curved metallic wall of the circular stadium structure
vehicle banks right to navigate around the stadium perimeter while ascending slightly

agents.ego_description: navigating around the perimeter of the stadium structure, adjusting altitude to clear the roof

entered.detail: geometric glass and metal grid pattern forming the roof of the stadium

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the urban canyon into open space near the massive circular stadium. The camera banks around the curved structure, revealing the geometric glass roof grid. The left skyscraper fades into the background as the stadium dominates the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: flying over the geometric glass roof of the stadium

events.description: passing over the stadium roof creates shifting geometric shadows across the cockpit
exiting the stadium area and transitioning to open highway interchange view

agents.ego_description: flying directly over the stadium's geometric glass roof before beginning descent toward the highway

entered.detail: complex network of highways and overpasses visible in the distance beyond the stadium

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes directly over the stadium's intricate glass roof grid, casting geometric shadows inside the cockpit. As the stadium recedes behind, a sprawling highway interchange becomes visible ahead, marking the transition from dense urban core to peripheral infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial desert landscape with highway interchanges

events.description: vehicle banks slightly while following the highway corridor toward industrial towers

agents.ego_description: flying over a vast industrial desert landscape following the highway network toward distant smokestacks

entered.detail: tall industrial smokestacks and cooling towers rising from the desert floor ahead
distant mountain range forming the horizon backdrop

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle leaving the city entirely, flying over a barren industrial desert with complex highway interchanges below. The circular stadium and skyscrapers disappear from view as industrial towers and distant mountains dominate the horizon. The landscape is arid with sparse vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person flight that transitions from a dense futuristic urban canyon into a barren industrial desert. It begins by weaving between glass skyscrapers under a bright midday sun, moving steadily toward a massive circular stadium in the distance. As the vehicle emerges from the city canyon, the camera banks around the curved structure to reveal a geometric glass roof grid that casts shifting shadows across the cockpit. The scene then opens up as the stadium recedes, revealing a sprawling highway interchange that marks the shift from the urban core to the city's periphery. Finally, the skyscrapers disappear entirely as the vehicle flies over an arid landscape of industrial towers and complex interchanges set against a horizon of distant mountains.
